description_long: This is a tall, freestanding hall tree or entryway organizer, featuring a high vertical back panel with a dark wood shelf and four brass coat hooks mounted near the top. Below the hooks, there is a wide bench surface in a matching dark wood finish, suitable for sitting or placing items. The lower section contains a two-compartment storage area: one side is an open cubby, while the other is a pull-out drawer with a brass handle, which is shown removed in the images. The structure is primarily composed of light-colored wood panels with contrasting dark wood accents on the shelf, bench, and base trim. The overall design is functional and elegant, suitable for urban entryways, lobbies, or mudrooms. The object is designed to provide storage, seating, and hanging space in a compact vertical footprint.
description: A tall, freestanding entryway organizer with a high back, coat hooks, a bench, and a lower storage drawer and cubby, finished in light and dark wood tones.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full height, four coat hooks, upper shelf, bench, and both the open cubby and the removed drawer with its handle visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the bench, the thickness of the panels, and the drawer fully removed from the lower compartment.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, uninterrupted back panel and the base trim, with no visible interactive features.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the bench depth and the drawer removed, with the open cubby visible.
